title: Petals: Run LLMs at home, BitTorrent-style
summary: Petals 是一个去中心化的平台，允许用户通过 BitTorrent 风格的点对点网络在家中运行大型语言模型（LLMs）。它利用分布式计算资源，将模型层分散到多个参与者之间，从而降低硬件门槛，支持协作推理和微调，无需依赖集中式服务器。
summary_en: Petals is a decentralized platform that enables users to run large language models (LLMs) at home using a BitTorrent-style peer-to-peer network. It distributes model layers across participants, reducing hardware requirements and enabling collaborative inference and fine-tuning without centralized servers.
